scripts.dev: npm run fixports && npm run dev:start
scripts.dev:start: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c cyan,magenta 'npm run start:server' 'npm run start:client'
scripts.build: npm install --workspaces --include-workspace-root && npm run build:clean && npm run build:compile
scripts.build:compile: npm run build -w apps/client && npm run build -w apps/server
scripts.build:analyze: ANALYZE=true npm run build -w apps/client && echo 'Bundle analysis: apps/client/dist/stats.html'
scripts.build:stats: npm run build -w apps/client && ls -lh apps/client/dist/assets/js/
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w apps/client && npm run type-check -w apps/server
